pains.summary: Marketing analytics and attribution is a black box for the team
pains.quote: reporting, analytics, funnel conversion metrics, all of that is top of mind for us and a black box currently for the team
pains.speaker: Jen Leaver

pains.summary: IT team is pushing back on building reporting/analytics in-house, creating urgency to buy vs build
pains.quote: we are getting pushback that they will not be able to prioritize that in Q1. And so that helped kind of expedite the need for us to buy versus build
pains.speaker: Jen Leaver

pains.summary: Data hygiene issues with multiple contacts and poor data maintenance
pains.quote: We have like some really pretty, pretty sad data hygiene issues and, and part of it was, I guess built to compliment the product
pains.speaker: Matthew Schultz

pains.summary: No dedicated marketing operations or funnel analytics capability existed before
pains.quote: There's been just kind of this autopilot for a year and a half, two years
pains.speaker: Jimbo

pains.summary: Contacts database in Marketo is bloated and needs cleanup
pains.quote: we have a whole nother side thread going on about getting contacts cleaned up in Marketo because that's just been not maintained well
pains.speaker: Jimbo

tools_switched_from.reason: IT cannot prioritize building reporting in Q1, creating urgency to buy vs build
tools_switched_from.quote: we are getting pushback that they will not be able to prioritize that in Q1. And so that helped kind of expedite the need for us to buy versus build
tools_switched_from.speaker: Jen Leaver

tools_switched_from.reason: Has account prioritization but lacks full funnel attribution and pipeline predictability; being upgraded not replaced
tools_switched_from.quote: we can understand, again, like accounts that we need to prioritize based on buying stages. We can also layer in contact fit and profile scores for helping to prioritize leads. So that piece I'm, I'm less concerned about
tools_switched_from.speaker: Jen Leaver

political_tussles.summary: IT is pushing back on prioritizing internal build, forcing marketing to seek vendor solution
political_tussles.quote: we are getting pushback that they will not be able to prioritize that in Q1. And so that helped kind of expedite the need for us to buy versus build
political_tussles.speaker: Jen Leaver

political_tussles.summary: Jen exploring whether to pull budget from sales to fund RevSure if it serves sales use cases too
political_tussles.quote: if this is something again that we could use beyond just the marketing team, it might be something where I could pull some budget from sales to help support as well
political_tussles.speaker: Jen Leaver

political_tussles.summary: IT concerned marketing team isn't ready for implementation while marketing wants to move fast
political_tussles.quote: I'm super concerned that because they're new, they're not fully versed in all of the underlying things it's gonna take to get us to this point where Rev share's gonna deliver that value
political_tussles.speaker: Jimbo

contrarians.claim: CRM as single source of truth is a myth
contrarians.why_unusual: Most RevTech vendors position CRM as the central hub; RevSure argues against needing all data in CRM
contrarians.quote: CRM or any system as a single source of truth is kind of a myth because everything is evolving and things are changing
contrarians.speaker: Deepinder Singh Dhingra

contrarians.claim: Don't need to change lead statuses or source system data for attribution
contrarians.why_unusual: Most attribution tools require standardized funnel stages and clean source data
contrarians.quote: our requirements on the source systems is actually is very little. Like we are not like interested in having you change lead statuses or any things
contrarians.speaker: Deepinder Singh Dhingra

revsure_problems.problem: Client IT concerned that 4-week onboarding is unrealistic given their data quality and team readiness
revsure_problems.quote: I worry that we're gonna start this revshare implementation while we're still trying to get everything else kinda cleaned up
revsure_problems.speaker: Jimbo

best_about_revsure.summary: Pipeline predictability is what Karen (CMO reference) uses 2-3 times daily
best_about_revsure.quote: pipeline predictability is like what Karen uses two times a day, two to three times a day from like a CMOs perspective
best_about_revsure.speaker: Alex Cox

best_about_revsure.summary: Product is robust enough to be a 3-hour demo
best_about_revsure.quote: this could have been a three hour demo, like easily three hour demo. So it's really robust technology
best_about_revsure.speaker: Suzin Wold

best_about_revsure.summary: Tactical channel views are unique and above what competitors offer
best_about_revsure.quote: these tactical or channel-based views are on top of what I, I can get from trending. So that's why I'm intrigued by these views. 'cause these are kind of like definitely over and above what I can do with trending
best_about_revsure.speaker: Simon Byrne

immediate.win: Get pipeline predictability for CMO Susan's use case
immediate.quote: for Susan's use case here, it's having the, the pipeline predictability that yeah, that's gonna be something that I know she's gonna wanna, that's gonna be very important to her
immediate.speaker: Jen Leaver

immediate.win: Avoid retroactive contract negotiations by including forecasting upfront
immediate.quote: I would rather have a conversation about including that with whatever. Okay. Contracting putting in place versus having to go back and retroactively add that in later in the year
immediate.speaker: Jen Leaver

immediate.win: Get free onboarding month to delay contract start
immediate.quote: what I can offer you is like a month or so for free too, so it doesn't eat away your contract
immediate.speaker: Alex Cox

long_term.win: Full go-to-market visibility across marketing, sales, CS, not just marketing
long_term.quote: every single touch point from sales, marketing, cs, upsell, cross sell, all product lines, right? Global, right. So like yeah, we, we definitely do
long_term.speaker: Alex Cox

long_term.win: Replace black box with white box analytics for strategic planning
long_term.quote: making the black box in a white box, you need to have a very strong foundation, right, of data
long_term.speaker: Deepinder Singh Dhingra

before_state.pain_summary: Marketing analytics and funnel metrics are a black box; no dedicated marketing ops team until recently; data hygiene issues in Marketo; IT pushing back on building reporting in-house

after_state.with_revsure: Full funnel attribution with predictive pipeline visibility across GTM teams, though Gen AI features must be disabled due to PII policy
wins_realized: Identified pipeline predictability as key CMO need
Negotiating creative pricing with advisory committee and case study options
open_issues: AI council approval needed for machine learning use
Need to confirm multi-year vs single-year contract structure
